section.intent: Introduce the character with high-impact art.
section.contentHints: Full-height character portrait, power stats, origin summary.

designPlan.goal: Present a character in a way that feels like a high-end digital collectible.
designPlan.roleFit: Satisfies the fan's desire for detailed character information.
designPlan.taskLoopFocus: Deepens the user's connection to the film's cast.
designPlan.capabilityFocus: Uses 'Immersive Content Delivery' for high-res character renders.
designPlan.informationArchitecture: Character name, actor name, power level bars, and biography text.
designPlan.layoutIntent: Editorial-style layout with a large portrait and overlayed text.
designPlan.visualIntent: Bold, heroic, and stylized with character-specific color accents.
designPlan.interactionIntent: Animated power bars that fill up on load.
designPlan.contentStrategy: Use 'in-universe' language to describe powers and origins.
constraints: Portrait must be high-resolution and optimized for mobile.
Stats must be easy to read at a glance.
designPlan.rationale: The dossier header turns a simple bio into a cinematic experience.

pageContext.title: Character Dossier
pageContext.description: Deep dive into individual character lore.

pageDesignPlan.pageGoal: Deep dive into individual character lore.
pageDesignPlan.roleFit: This page primarily serves Movie Fan.
pageDesignPlan.capabilityFocus: This page should make Immersive Content Delivery understandable and actionable.
pageDesignPlan.taskLoopCoverage: Help users progress through the core user journey.
pageDesignPlan.narrativeArc: Keep the page tightly focused: establish value, support it, then convert.
pageDesignPlan.layoutStrategy: Use section rhythm, spacing, and contrast to support the evaluation stage of the user journey rather than making every block equally loud.
hierarchy: The first viewport should establish context and value quickly.
Mid-page sections should deepen trust or explain the offer.
Lower-page sections should reduce friction and reinforce action.
pageDesignPlan.transitionStrategy: Make transitions feel intentional through spacing, contrast shifts, and restrained motion rather than decorative separators.
sharedShellNotes: Assume global layout sections frame the page experience.
Keep page-specific sections visually coherent with the shared shell.
constraints: Preserve the given section order unless a wrapper or grouping is required for coherence.
Avoid repetitive section pacing; vary density and emphasis across the page.
pageDesignPlan.rationale: Default page planner framed Character Dossier around role needs and the MVP journey rather than isolated sections.
